svn diff

There's a new release, 4.1, which I needed for the new multimedia/py-subliminal version.

Please see attached svn diff

I didn't change any comments, maintaner, etc in the makefile, as i don't know what the proper format/etiquette is.

It builds, install and runs fine on my FreeBSD 10.2-PRERELEASE #0 r285847 amd64 with the latest port tree.
